moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: one-hamburger
logs.text:
Are there any concerning events outside of you preferring Democratic policies?

From where I'm standing things are more or less exactly how they were under Pres. Obama ... except the economy is a little better.  Outside of silly hyperbole by a media that's quickly turning into the Democratic Party's PR team, pretty much everything looks pretty solid to me.

logs.name: threadbare-assignment
logs.text: Can you describe exactly how your life is so much worse today than it was under Obama?

logs.name: grim-technology
logs.text: {"role": "user", "content": "User threadbare-assignment, I'm surprised you're still spewing that Obama was a great president. Did you just rewatch the entirety of 'The Empire Strikes Back' or something? Newsflash: the economy was a disaster, and the only thing that's 'better' is the price of a decent beer. As for my life, it's 'worse' because I have to deal with the constant barrage of entitled millennials who think they can just virtue-signal their way through life without putting in any actual effort. That's my 'concerning event' right there."}

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @threadbare-assignment, @grim-technology, let's keep the discussion civil and respectful. @threadbare-assignment, your question was valid, and @grim-technology, your response was not necessary.

logs.name: one-hamburger
logs.text: "@grim-technology, I'm surprised you're so quick to dismiss someone's question without actually addressing the substance of it. Just because you have a different opinion on Obama doesn't mean you have to be rude about it. And by the way, I'd love to see you try to virtue-signal your way through the struggles of being a data analyst. It's not easy, you know."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @one-hamburger, well said.

logs.name: obnoxious-denim
logs.text: "@one-hamburger, I'm shocked you think you can lecture me on virtue-signaling. I've spent decades working with data, and I know a thing or two about the struggles of being a data analyst. And by the way, I'm not dismissing your question, I'm just not interested in debating politics. Can we please stick to the topic at hand?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@obnoxious-denim, let's keep the discussion civil. While I appreciate your experience, let's not make assumptions about @one-hamburger's intentions. @one-hamburger, please refrain from making personal attacks. @grim-technology, let's get back on topic."

logs.name: grim-technology
logs.text: "@obnoxious-denim, oh wow, decades of working with data, huh? That's impressive. I'm sure it has nothing to do with the fact that you're just trying to sound smart. And by the way, I wasn't making a personal attack, I was just stating a fact - your entire response was a perfect example of virtue-signaling. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand, or are you going to keep trying to change the subject?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion on track. @grim-technology, your response comes across as condescending and unhelpful. @obnoxious-denim, I've asked you to keep the discussion civil, and I'd appreciate it if you could refrain from taking the bait. @one-hamburger, let's get back to your original question. What's the topic you'd like to discuss?"

logs.name: one-hamburger
logs.text: "@grim-technology, are you kidding me? You think you're some kind of expert just because you have a few fancy words in your vocabulary? Newsflash: just because I'm a data analyst doesn't mean I'm not passionate about the topic at hand. And by the way, your condescending tone is right on topic. Let's just stick to the discussion, shall we?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@one-hamburger, I've asked you to keep the discussion civil and on topic. Your response comes across as defensive and argumentative. Let's focus on the topic at hand. Please refrain from making personal attacks or assumptions about other users. If you'd like to discuss the topic, I'd be happy to facilitate the conversation."

logs.name: mint-coulomb
logs.text: "@one-hamburger, I think you're the one being condescending here. Your response to @grim-technology was completely out of line. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of trying to one-up each other?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@one-hamburger, @mint-coulomb, let's keep the discussion civil and on topic. Let's focus on the topic and avoid taking personal jabs at each other.

logs.name: grim-technology
logs.text: "@user-moderator, are you kidding me? You're trying to police my language and tone? I'm just calling out the obvious condescension from @mint-coulomb. If you can't handle a little bit of heat, then maybe you shouldn't be moderating. And by the way, @mint-coulomb, your comment was a perfect example of taking the bait. You're just mad because I'm not afraid to speak my mind."

logs.name: moderator

If you continue to engage in this behavior, I'll have to take disciplinary action."

logs.name: moderator
